fixes_applied.details: Added .eslintrc.js with standard AEM boilerplate config: airbnb-base extends, @babel/eslint-parser, no-param-reassign props:false (allows property mutation on DOM elements — standard EDS pattern). Added .eslintignore to exclude eds_migrate/ migration tooling. npm run lint (eslint + stylelint) passes with zero errors.

fixes_applied.issue: HIGH — AEM Code Sync not installed
fixes_applied.details: AEM Code Sync bot IS installed (installationId: 34179329). Admin API confirms code.status=200 for all files (aem.js, scripts.js, fstab.yaml, .eslintrc.js, etc.). Code bus is fully synced with latest commit 51f3efb. The initial verifier run may have checked before the bot processed the first commit. Triggered manual code sync via POST to admin.hlx.page/code endpoint — completed successfully.

Preview/live pages return 404 because the DA content source (content.da.live/manuel-vara/eds-migration) has no content. Creating DA content requires an EDS_TOKEN which is not provided in this session. Code-side is fully operational (code bus synced). Once content is authored on DA, pages will render.
body.modal-open { overflow: hidden; } is standard Block Collection pattern for scroll-locking when modal is open. Left as-is per EDS convention.

evidence.details: eslint (airbnb-base) and stylelint (stylelint-config-standard) both pass with zero errors on all blocks/, scripts/, styles/ files.
admin.hlx.page/status confirms code.status=200 for fstab.yaml, aem.js, scripts.js, .eslintrc.js. installationId=34179329.
https://main--eds-migration--manuel-vara.aem.page/ returns 404. DA requires EDS_TOKEN for content creation.

summary: Fixed .eslintrc.js (lint passes zero errors). AEM Code Sync confirmed installed and synced (code bus 200). Preview blocked on DA content authoring — requires EDS_TOKEN not available in this session. All code-side issues resolved.
